autor: I might not believe in fate but I do believe in causality and who's to say fate isn't just a sort of social mathematics that brings like-minded people together.
explicacao: Citação de I might not believe in fate but I do believe in causality and who's to say fate isn't just a sort of social mathematics that brings like-minded people together. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Maybe I'm wrong” articula reflexao, simon-pegg, nerd-do-well em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como nerd-do-well.
